note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.6 cm x 0.7 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 42% slough, 58% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — not improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Physician notified of wound progression.
